name: approx_count
abstract: Fast row-count estimates with governed ANALYZE refresh and a metrics ledger
description: Serves fast row-count estimates from pg_class.reltuples without forcing exact COUNT(*) scans, refreshing stale statistics with a governed, advisory-lock-serialized ANALYZE. Auto-detects read-only transactions and standbys, ships an optional closed-loop tuner, and records a metrics ledger and dashboard.

approx_count.abstract: Fast row-count estimates with governed ANALYZE refresh
